universe: label v1.1.0 (commit 2cdbac1・newcomer '12' 誤除外修正後・2023 eligible 42214)
verdict: A1 (speed_figure basic 6 + binary) is the black-letter winner: profitable across all 5 BT windows (avg 1.14), leak re-audit clean. less-features wins.

d_drilldown_9_1_degradation_on_A2.verdict: distribution_shape_5 (median/best2/trend) is the main culprit (drop +0.039 when removed); condition_fitness_6 weaker (+0.017). both are noise/multicollinear on small sub-populations.

C1_A3_minus_9_1_ext_11_A1_plus_phase10.verdict: Phase10 also degrades A1 (1.046->0.742). all-in != best.

a1_cross_window_robustness.purpose: rule out 2023 single-year fluke (recovery 1.14 is suspiciously good)

a1_leak_re_audit.PIT: PASS - speed_figure computed from past races only (available_at < feature_cutoff_datetime=race_date-1day, _pit_cutoff_prefilter)
a1_leak_re_audit.target_leakage: PASS - target race same-day outcome / full-period par-variant blocked (speed_figure.py L19)
a1_leak_re_audit.odds_proxy_SAFE_01: PASS - speed_figure is time-based, no odds
a1_leak_re_audit.verdict: clean - PIT-correct, odds-free, no target leakage

metric_two_systems_note.09_system: run_speed_figure_stopgate._compute_selected_roi (selector EV>=1.0 only) - A0=0.7018 A1=0.8956 (stale v1.0.0 label)
metric_two_systems_note.12_system: select_bets 3-cond+top-2 - A0=0.6471 (05-backtest, stale v1.0.0) / A0=0.7308 A1=1.0459 (harness, v1.1.0)
metric_two_systems_note.verdict: same recovery formula, different selector+label -> not directly comparable. 12-system v1.1.0 is canonical.

b1_race_relative.reason: A1 binary already profitable+robust; race_relative marginal value low; q_shrink route mid-size fix not worth it

label_bug_impact.bug: newcomer_syubetucd=['11','12'] mis-excluded '12' (1-win/maiden) as newcomer (code_tables.yaml '12'=3yo-newcomer is wrong)
label_bug_impact.fix: commit 2cdbac1 (label v1.1.0, class_name_normalized='新馬' basis, eligible 42214)
label_bug_impact.phase_11_12: PROVISIONAL - computed on buggy v1.0.0 universe (0.7314 etc). noted in 12-VERIFICATION.md (de410db). mechanism valid, values superseded by v1.1.0 ablation.

recommendation.action: black-letter baseline for new universe v1.1.0; is_primary switch is separate user-approved action (D-10)
